Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Zhonghui Huang. Author, maintainer.

  • Joseph Standing. Contributor.

  • Matthew Fidler. Contributor.

  • Frank Kloprogge. Contributor.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Huang Z (2026). nlmixr2autoinit: Automatic Generation of Initial Estimates for Population Pharmacokinetic Modeling. R package version 1.0.0, https://github.com/ucl-pharmacometrics/nlmixr2autoinit, https://ucl-pharmacometrics.github.io/nlmixr2autoinit. 

@Manual{,
  title = {nlmixr2autoinit: Automatic Generation of Initial Estimates for Population Pharmacokinetic Modeling},
  author = {Zhonghui Huang},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 1.0.0, https://github.com/ucl-pharmacometrics/nlmixr2autoinit},
